lines.text: I want to mail a letter to my grandma. She passed away recently, and I loved her a lot. I’m not sure what layout or tone to use. I just want to make her happy somehow.

choices.choiceText: Write it by hand, use crayons, and keep it heartfelt.
Type it neatly, correct every mistake, and follow strict rules.

lines.text: That sounds messy, but warm. I think Grandma would like that more than perfect grammar.
It’s very polished... but it doesn’t feel like me. I think I wanted a letter, not a report.
